arts.ttl: Atletico vs Real Madrid LIVE: Champions League team news and line-ups as Arsenal set to face winners
arts.sum: The Madrid rivals clash with Arsenal set to face the winners in the quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Ornstein CONFIRMS Arsenal and Liverpool are DESPERATE to sign Isak
arts.sum: David Ornstein has confirmed that Alexander Isak sits at the top of the summer shortlists of Arsenal and Liverpool . Transfer insider David Ornstein of The Athletic has now confirmed that Isak tops the summer shopping lists of Arsenal and Liverpool, but also made it clear that a move seems unlikely as things stand.

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available to face PSV Eindhoven as key player returns from injury
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, Gabriel Jesus, Kai Havertz and Takehiro Tomiyasu all remain sidelined with injuries and will not be in the matchday squad to take on PSV at the Emirates. Arsenal will be looking to book a place in the quarter-final of the Champions League when they face PSV Eindhoven.

arts.ttl: Berta plots €360m Arsenal spending spree as SEVEN signings lined up
arts.sum: Incoming Arsenal sporting director Andrea Berta is determined to make a splash in his first transfer window, according to a reliable report. Jacobs reports that Berta could look to make up to seven signings this summer.

arts.ttl: 19 G/A star is top transfer target for incoming Arsenal director
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly eyeing up Wolves forward Matheus Cunha for this summer, with the Brazilian emerging as a top target for Andrea Berta. It was recently reported by the Athletic’s David Ornstein that Berta was set to take over as Arsenal’s new director, making the move from Atletico Madrid in the coming weeks. “I would […] The post 19 G/A star is top transfer target for incoming Arsenal director appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Andrea Berta personally wants to sign Alexander Isak's £70m Newcastle teammate at Arsenal - journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal could sign the Newcastle star for £60 to £70 million 💰

arts.ttl: Arsenal fire early double team news hint before PSV as Mikel Arteta considers seven changes
arts.sum: Arsenal should have their spot in the Champions League quarter-finals confirmed later this evening after the last-16 second leg against PSV. Arsenal face PSV Eindhoven in the- second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on March 12.
